name: Coosa Pines
description_short: Coosa Pines Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union offering auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, and savings accounts to members in the Coosa Valley region.
description_long:
Coosa Pines Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the Coosa Valley area, operating as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization has established itself as a community-focused lender with emphasis on personal relationships and member service. Their routing number is 262287551, and they maintain multiple branch locations accessible through their website locator tool.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (APR as low as 4.60%), 15-year fixed mortgages (APR as low as 5.52%), Visa Platinum credit cards (APR as low as 9.95%), personal loans (APR as low as 10.50%), home equity lines of credit, and various savings products including share certificates, club accounts, money market accounts, and IRAs. They provide youth accounts and business accounts to serve different member segments. Digital services include online banking, mobile apps with fund transfers and mobile deposits, Zelle integration, and access to a student loan marketplace.

Coosa Pines distinguishes itself through emphasis on member relationships, with testimonials highlighting personalized service and family-like treatment. They host community events like the Spring Auto & Boat Sale, offer financial calculators for multiple product types, provide GreenPath financial counseling services, and maintain a Love My Credit Union Rewards program. The credit union awards $16,000 in annual scholarships to graduating high school seniors in their service area, demonstrating community investment.

As a credit union, Coosa Pines offers the advantage of NCUA insurance protection and member ownership, though availability is restricted to those who meet membership eligibility requirements. Their competitive rates and breadth of services position them well for regional members, though geographic limitations and membership requirements may restrict access compared to national banks. The organization appears operationally sound with active marketing, accessible digital platforms, and community engagement programs.
services: Auto loans with rates starting at 4.60% APR
Mortgage loans including 15-year fixed mortgages with rates starting at 5.52% APR
Home equity lines of credit for home improvement projects
Visa Platinum credit card with rewards program starting at 9.95% APR
Personal loans with rates starting at 10.50% APR
Savings accounts, share certificates, club accounts, and money market accounts
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and youth savings accounts
Online banking and mobile app with fund transfers, balance checking, and mobile deposits
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 4.60% APR, positioned as Coosa Valley's best auto loan provider
Comprehensive digital services including mobile apps with mobile deposit capability and Zelle integration
Membership eligibility may qualify for NCUA deposit insurance protection
Free financial calculators for auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, and personal finances
Community investment through $16,000 annual scholarship program for graduating high school seniors
Multiple loan products including recreational/boat loans, home equity lines of credit, and personal loans
GreenPath financial counseling services available to members
Love My Credit Union Rewards program for cardholders
cons: Membership is restricted to those meeting eligibility requirements; not open to all consumers
Geographic service limitation to Coosa Valley region reduces accessibility for out-of-area members
Visa Platinum credit card APR starts at 9.95%, which is higher than some competitive credit card offers
Limited branch network compared to national banks, though Co-Op Shared Branching partially mitigates this
Personal loan APR as low as 10.50% is moderate compared to some personal loan lenders
best_for: Members in the Coosa Valley region seeking below-market auto loan rates and personalized service
Individuals wanting community-focused banking with member ownership benefits and local branch access
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing business accounts and flexible lending solutions
High school students and families seeking scholarship opportunities and youth banking products
diagnosis: Coosa Pines Federal Credit Union is best for members in the Coosa Valley region who qualify for membership and seek competitive auto and mortgage rates with personalized, community-focused service. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility restrictions and geographic service limitations mean this institution is not accessible to all consumers nationwide, making it suitable primarily for those already in or relocating to their service area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Coosa Pines — NCUA-insured credit union in Childersburg, AL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
